subcodes.first_line: Consider and reflect upon what hath come to pass in the world, how the divines and mystics of the earth, by night and by day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملاحظه نما و تفکر کن در آنچه در عالم واقع شده علمای ارض و عرفای آن شب و روز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @high station of the true believer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
